event_text: The Fourth Crusade captures Constantinople and reshapes the Greek world.
The Byzantines recapture Constantinople from the Latin Empire.
John VI Kantakouzenos is proclaimed emperor, opening a Byzantine civil war that weakens imperial power.
Constantinople falls to the Ottoman Empire.
The Despotate of the Morea falls to the Ottomans.
Crete falls to the Ottomans after a long siege of Candia.
The Orlov Revolt breaks out in the Peloponnese.
The Filiki Eteria is founded to support Greek independence.
The Greek War of Independence begins.
The First National Assembly at Epidaurus declares Greek independence.
Allied fleets defeat the Ottoman-Egyptian fleet at Navarino.
The London Protocol recognises Greek independence.
The Kingdom of Greece is established with Otto as king.
A revolution forces King Otto to grant a constitution.
The Ionian Islands are united with Greece.
Thessaly is annexed to Greece.
Athens hosts the first modern Olympic Games.
Greece is defeated in the Greco-Turkish War.
The Goudi coup prompts political reform.
Greece fights in the Balkan Wars and expands its territory.
Greece enters the First World War on the Allied side.
Greek forces land at Smyrna, beginning the Greco-Turkish War phase that ends in defeat in Asia Minor.
The Treaty of Lausanne confirms a compulsory population exchange between Greece and Turkey.
The Second Hellenic Republic is proclaimed.
Ioannis Metaxas establishes an authoritarian regime.
Greece rejects Italy’s ultimatum and enters the Second World War.
Germany invades Greece, leading to Axis occupation.
Violence following elections marks the opening of the Greek Civil War.
Greece joins NATO.
A military coup establishes the Greek junta.
Democracy is restored after the fall of the junta.
Greece joins the European Communities.
Greece joins the eurozone.
Athens hosts the Olympic Games.
The Greek government-debt crisis brings austerity and political change.
Greece holds a bailout referendum during the debt crisis.
The Prespa Agreement resolves the Macedonia naming dispute.
The COVID-19 pandemic affects Greece.
